text:
TheParis 2024 Olympicshas entered the home straight with just days to go until the Games are wrapped up with Sunday’s closing ceremony.

The USA and China are leading the way in the medal table, whilstTeam GBare enjoying another successful Games with gold medals for the likes ofAlex Yee in the triathlonandKeeley Hodgkinson in the 800m.

But exactly how many sports and events are there in the Olympics and how many medals are being handed out to athletes in the French capital?

Follow Metro.co.uk’s live blog for updates from the Paris 2024 Olympics

Here is everything you need to know.

There are a total of 32 sports at the Paris 2024 Olympics.

Breaking, commonly known as breakdancing, is the newest Olympic sport, making its debut in Paris.

Breaking debuted at the 2018 Youth Olympic Games in Buenos Aires and was chosen for inclusion in the French capital, but it will not be returning for the Los Angeles games in 2028.

Surfing, skateboarding, sport climbing and 3×3 basketball were debutant sports at the Toyko 2020 games and they have all returned for Paris.

Five new sports will make their Olympic debut at LA 2028; baseball/softball, lacrosse, cricket, flag football and squash.

Athletics, cycling, fencing, gymnastics, shooting, swimming, tennis, weightlifting and wrestling were all part of the first modern Olympic games in 1896.

Across the 32 sports, there are 329 events being contested at Paris 2024.

This means that 987 medals will be handed out across the fortnight.

Each medalcontains scrap metal taken from the Eiffel Towerwhen it has been refurbished over the years.

Gold medals contain at least six grams of 24 carat gold coating, while the rest is made up of silver.

Silver medals are made up of silver, whilst bronze medals contain copper, zinc, tin, and traces of silver.

title: How many sports and medals are there at the Paris 2024 Olympics? | Metro News
description: Find out how many sports and events there are at the Paris 2024 Olympics and how many medals are handed out at the Games.
